name: E-z Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped nuts (walnut, pecan, macadamia, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
With the holidays approaching, many of us are busy preparing for celebrations and finding less time to make homemade treats. This recipe simplifies fudge-making while delivering a delicious result.
1. Melt butter and chocolate chips together in a saucepan over low heat. Stir until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg and continue stirring until incorporated.
3. Mix in powdered sugar, vanilla extract (or rum), and chopped nuts.
4. Remove from heat and spread the mixture into a lightly greased 9 x 13 pan.
5. Allow to cool and firm up for several hours.
6. Once set, remove from the refrigerator and bring it to room temperature.
7. Slice into squares and serve at room temperature (a warmer room will make the fudge soft and creamy). ENJOY!
